timeline.section_subtitle: From a single idea to a work management platform trusted by thousands of businesses

items.title: A Real-World Need
items.description: While delivering software outsourcing services to international markets, the Hitek team frequently received questions from clients about how we ensure transparency and accountability in our team's performance.

items.title: Finding the Answer
items.description: We recognized that the geographical distance between international clients and the Hitek team in Vietnam was a significant barrier to trust and governance. From that insight, Hitek began building a platform that allows clients to remotely manage and monitor vendors in a visual, transparent, and true-to-reality way — as if they were working side by side with our team.

items.title: Refining the Product for Internal Use
items.description: Over the next five years, we continuously developed, improved, and optimized the system to meet reporting needs and ensure transparency for our clients. With a commitment to "real work" and "real accountability", Hitek shares all image and text data related to each employee's work activity in real time.

items.title: AI Integration & Broader Reach
items.description: From 2025, the AI wave has unlocked significant leaps in productivity and innovation. Seizing that momentum, Hitek integrated AI into the system to analyze user activity data, predict work performance, and automatically generate reports for management and clients. We believe this is the right time to spread the value of this solution — helping build trust for international clients collaborating remotely with tech talent in Vietnam.

values.section_subtitle: The core values that guide every activity and decision we make

items.title: Mission
items.description: Partnering with Vietnamese businesses to optimize workforce productivity, enhance data security, and build lasting trust with their clients.

items.title: Vision
items.description: To become Vietnam's leading work management platform, elevating international confidence in Vietnamese talent and driving global business connectivity.

items.title: Core Values
items.description: Continuous innovation, transparent operations, maximum data security, and always placing the customer at the heart of every development decision.

culture.section_subtitle: The talented team and work culture that set Hitek Work apart

items.title: Diverse Team
items.description: Over 100 technology, design, and business professionals from various fields, united in building the best product together.

items.title: Continuous Innovation
items.description: We constantly research and adopt the latest technologies to deliver superior experiences to our clients.

items.title: Absolute Security
items.description: Data security is our top priority. Our solution includes an On-Premise mechanism, ensuring data is stored internally within the client's own systems.

items.title: Sustainable Growth
items.description: We build long-term relationships with our clients, growing and succeeding together.

team_image.title: The Hitek Work Team
team_image.subtitle: We are a diverse, creative team always focused on delivering the best possible value to our clients.
